text.message: cant believe u got a city out of it

try playing more and talking less
anyways im most certain im going for army this game

oj can you chill man jesus lol
the guy has 6 9 5. makes a bs claim I have a city

hes taking from me every time

but i think if we count pips u're ahead after u settle on the 6 right?
u end up with 11 plus cards

cause u need army this game
so it makes sense for u to block my wheat

i didnt mean to lie about
u dont have to believe me tho

cant trade with u either green
